title: Solved Any DVD have the Original Reiquarium Secuence
display_title: Solved Any DVD have the Original Reiquarium Secuence
wikitext:
[]: [Solved] Any DVD have the Original "Reiquarium" Secuence ?             Quote Post by Jsierra008 » Mon Dec 26, 2016 11:58 pm Hi there, Excuse me if this are solved (i don't found a topic with the answer); i'm looking for some collections, i have the Perfect Collection except the 2 Director's cut DVD Pack, (Resurrection & Reborn), Platinum Edition, Archives of Evangelion DVD & Blu Ray, and Renewal(w/ test type disc) but in my research i've found the polemic "Reiquarium" sequence deletion/modification, and knewed that the VHS Genesis 0:12 (KIVA-260) has the original NPC sequence. But in the Japanese Releases database of this site, i can see a Pre Renewal DVD, KIBA-6/GDVD-006; these DVD have the Original NPC "Reiquarium" Sequence like VHS ? Thanks for all

[]: Re: [Question] Any DVD have the Original "Reiquarium" Secuence ?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Dec 27, 2016 3:22 am For the record, I see that you have found the answer in another thread - yes, the pre-Renewal director's cut DVDs (Japanese and English) have the Reiquarium background images, which were removed again in the Renewal remastering.

[]: Re: [Solved] Any DVD have the Original "Reiquarium" Secuence ?             Quote Post by Jsierra008 » Tue Dec 27, 2016 10:24 am pwhodges wrote: For the record, I see that you have found the answer in another thread - yes, the pre-Renewal director's cut DVDs (Japanese and English) have the Reiquarium background images, which were removed again in the Renewal remastering.

[]: Re: [Solved] Any DVD have the Original "Reiquarium" Secuence ?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Dec 28, 2016 1:15 pm ^ Ebay is probably your best bet for finding it. That's how I accuiered my copy.

[]: Re: [Solved] Any DVD have the Original "Reiquarium" Secuence ?             Quote Post by Jsierra008 » Wed Dec 28, 2016 7:19 pm Thanks for answer
